title: Three geographically separate domestications of Asian rice
author: Civan, Peter
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description:
Data sets reported in Civan, P., Craig, H., Cox, C.J. & Brown, T. Three geographically separate domestications of Asian rice. Nature Plants 1, 15164 (2015). 

 SNP matrices extracted from the whole genome SNP dataset [Huang, X. et al. A map of rice genome variation reveals the origin of cultivated rice. Nature 490, 497–503 (2012)]. 

 Data formats: 
- PED format (.ped, .pedind, .pedsnp) 
- PHYLIP format (.phy pseudomolecules)
